semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI violation detection system.
responsibilities: Creates temporary directories and initializes git repositories for isolated test environments.
Executes the built ArchSpine CLI (dist/cli/index.js) via child_process to simulate violation detection.
Asserts correct exit codes, stdout/stderr output, and log file generation under various violation scenarios.
Cleans up temporary files and handles test teardown via afterEach or beforeAll hooks.
Provides end-to-end coverage of the 'spine check violations' command and rule enforcement.
outOfScope: Production code logic for violation detection or rule parsing.
Unit tests for internal functions or modules.
CLI command definitions or configuration interfaces.
Any exported symbols for external consumption.
invariants: Must be run after building the CLI (dist/cli/index.js must exist).
Requires git CLI installed and available in PATH.
Requires Node.js environment with vitest test runner.
Temporary directories are created under the system's temp directory.
Logs are written to .e2e-logs directory for debugging.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide end-to-end validation that the ArchSpine CLI correctly detects and reports rule violations in a project context.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Fix ESLint errors, E2E prompt injection, and better-sqlite3 compatibility — likely ensuring the test suite runs cleanly with updated tooling.
